content:
- **Terminal cocycle gate `trivialisation_restrict_compat`: effort-broken (iter-033).** The blueprint
  is now split into 5 named per-constituent restriction-naturality squares + a telescope (incl. the
  previously-omitted `uι` leg). **Decision made:** iter-034 proves the structural template (S2,
  `tensorObj_restrict_iso` square) first, then the rest. Steer via `USER_HINTS.md` if you'd prefer a
  different route for this infrastructure sub-project.
- **K1 μ-side `pushforward_lax_mu_comparison_lhs_tmul`: final automated attempt running (iter-033).**
  This is the last seed-1 residual, a 4-iter recurring mate-seam; it runs SOLO this iter with the
  expanded blueprint. If it stalls again, iter-034 will surface the seam here for your input rather
  than spend further helper cycles.
